svg.text: VPD GROW TENT — FULL WIRING DIAGRAM (8-Ch Relay Module)
⚠ 220V AC — LETHAL VOLTAGE — ONLY A QUALIFIED ELECTRICIAN SHOULD WIRE THIS SECTION
1. Remove VCC–JD-VCC jumper on relay board
2. All 220V wiring in conduit / rated cable
5. Relay switches LIVE wire only (N direct)
6. Earth all metal enclosures and loads
Relay GND + PSU GND + DHT22 GND
Top Fan / Bot Fan / Humidifier / Lights
switched live to all COM pins
